case_title: IGOR ZUBKO VS. TOUCHOFMODERN, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. FILED BY DEFENDANT AFFIRM HOLDINGS, INC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ZUBKO, IGOR AS TO DEFENDANT TOUCHOFMODERN, INC. AFFIRM HOLDINGS, INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-14-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$325.00) SERVED FEB-02-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TOUCHOFMODERN, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-14-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-14-2022 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF IGOR ZUBKO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AFFIRM HOLDINGS IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY ASHNEEL KUMAR (LICENSING LEAD). DEFENDANT TOUCHOFMODERN, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZUBKO, IGOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TOUCHOFMODERN, INC. AFFIRM HOLDINGS, INC $5,653.69 PRINCIPAL, $375.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,028.69, DEFENDANTS TOUCH OF MODERN & AFFIRM HOLDINGS ARE JOINTLY & SEVERALLY LIABLE FOR THE AWARD OF DAMAGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$375.00) SERVED FEB-04-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AFFIRM HOLDINGS, INC
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. FILED BY ZUBKO, IGOR AFFIRM HOLDINGS, INC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-14-2022 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT TOUCHOFMODERN, INC. AFFIRM HOLDINGS, INC
